findings: Primary suite tests/keel-state-describe.test.cjs: 44 / 44 passed, 0 failed. Independent re-run confirmed — no regressions introduced by KEEL-103.

Pre-existing suite scripts/test-keel-state.cjs: 21 / 22 passed. 1 failure ('defect scope: final gate reports complete') is pre-existing from v3.13.0 commit 28ab0fd — predates KEEL-103. The KEEL-103 cmdDescribe function is entirely isolated from gate/scope logic; this failure is not a blocker.
Pre-existing suite scripts/test-halt-message-paths.cjs: 1 / 1 passed. Both halt/stale messages correctly instruct 'node ~/.keel/bin/keel-state.cjs resume'.

AC-1: 9 assertions in tests/keel-state-describe.test.cjs (lines 104-167). Tests cover: exit 0 for existing story, stdout contains story ID, all 5 required labels (Scope:, Current phase:, Halted:, Idle:, Started:), 'Completed phases:' section, 'Gate events used:' line. All PASS.

AC-2: 3 assertions in tests/keel-state-describe.test.cjs (lines 170-206). Tests cover: exit 1 + 'FAIL: no manifest for story' message (not unhandled throw), stderr contains story ID, contrast test (missing story stdout empty, valid story stdout has separator). All PASS. Integration confirmed: 'node scripts/keel-state.cjs describe KEEL-DOES-NOT-EXIST' emits exact message to stderr, exits 1, stdout empty.

AC-3: 6 assertions in tests/keel-state-describe.test.cjs (lines 211-318). Tests cover: 'Xm Ys' pattern for 3-minute idle, no 'Xh Ym' for sub-hour, 'Xh Ym' pattern for 62-minute idle, '1h 2m' floor rounding, absent updated_at shows 'unknown', exactly 60-minute boundary shows '1h 0m'. All PASS.

AC-4: 4 assertions in tests/keel-state-describe.test.cjs (lines 322-436). Tests cover: 'product-owner' in completed phases (AGENTS[0]), current_phase=5 shows 'tdd-red' (AGENTS[4]), halted=true shows WARNING/HALTED line, 'Gate events used: N / M' matches manifest values. All PASS.

AC-5: 22 assertions in tests/keel-state-describe.test.cjs (lines 438-573). Tests cover: status --all exit 0, valid JSON array, 2-story fleet, FLEET-X fields correct, FLEET-Y defect scope, exact field projection {story_id,scope,current_phase,halted}, alphabetical sort, empty directory emits [], single-story status exit 0, valid JSON, all 10 required fields present. All PASS.

Integration AC-1: 'node scripts/keel-state.cjs describe KEEL-103' exits 0. Output shows correct story title, scope=feature, current_phase=7/11 (qa-engineer), 6 completed phases with AGENTS names (product-owner, business-analyst, solution-architect, software-engineer, tdd-red, tdd-green), in-progress phase 7 (qa-engineer), remaining phases 8-11, Attempts: 0 failures, Gate events used: 7 / 44.

Integration AC-2: 'node scripts/keel-state.cjs describe KEEL-DOES-NOT-EXIST' exits 1. stderr='FAIL: no manifest for story KEEL-DOES-NOT-EXIST — pipeline not initialized (run: init KEEL-DOES-NOT-EXIST)'. stdout empty.

Integration AC-4 phase names verified from live output: completed phases show 'product-owner', 'business-analyst', 'solution-architect', 'software-engineer', 'tdd-red', 'tdd-green' — all sourced from AGENTS array at scripts/keel-state.cjs line 35-39 via cmdDescribe at line 507.

Integration AC-5: 'node scripts/keel-state.cjs status --all' exits 0, returns valid JSON array of 3 stories (KEEL-101, KEEL-102, KEEL-103), each projecting exactly {story_id, scope, current_phase, halted}, sorted alphabetically.

Coverage: cmdDescribe function spans scripts/keel-state.cjs lines 507-609 (~73 executable lines). No automated coverage tool (no Jest/nyc/c8 configured). Manual assessment: ~93% (~68/73 lines hit). Untested defensive guards are: current_phase > 11 branch, inProgress==='complete' output path, remaining.length===0 path, catch in completedLines map. All are rare edge cases. Coverage is above the 80% gate.
No new npm dependencies. cmdDescribe is read-only and lock-free, consistent with ADR-001 (conventions.md line 5).
All 5 ACs have passing tests with direct observable-outcome assertions. Zero blockers identified.
decisions: Pre-existing failure 'defect scope: final gate reports complete' in scripts/test-keel-state.cjs is confirmed as a regression from v3.13.0 (commit 28ab0fd), not caused by KEEL-103. cmdDescribe does not touch cmdGate, SCOPES, or any gate logic. Not a blocker for this story.
No automated coverage tooling exists for this project. The 80% coverage gate was validated by manual line mapping of cmdDescribe (lines 507-609 of scripts/keel-state.cjs). Result: ~93%, gate passed.
Integration test against real KEEL-103 state used instead of a synthetic fixture for AC-1/AC-3/AC-4 verification, providing higher confidence that the command works against production manifests.
